text: Entering this modern, clean corridor, I am struck by a sense of orderliness and purpose, yet the sharply angled lines and glass evoke a feeling of disorientation—as though reality itself is slightly askew. Passing through the glass doors and into the vividly colored R+D exhibit, I am awash with curiosity. The interplay of intellectual rigor and creative energy fills the space, inviting contemplation of innovation and human potential. I feel present, yet simultaneously challenged to discern where I fit within this engineered environment, reminded of the eternal tension between observation and participation in the unfolding narrative of progress.
